summary: Iteration 30 readiness check (handover login flow + Calendar Project-Folder modal + portal smoke tests) before live franchisee onboarding. 9/10 pytest cases pass (1 intentional skip — destructive admin reset fulfill). Frontend portal login, navigation, File Vault, Territory map (Mapbox), HQ Updates, and Logout all verified end-to-end on the public preview URL. The Project Folder modal itself was NOT exercised because the trigger lives behind the 'VIEW PROJECTS FOR THIS MONTH' button on /portal/events — the modal flow needs a re-run before the franchisee logs in.

minor.issue: Field is `must_change_password` (not `force_password_change` as referenced in the review). Also has `handover_pending`. Inconsistent with the rest of the auth surface (`/auth/me` and `/auth/login` return `force_password_change`). Recommend aliasing or unifying.

ui_bugs.issue: No `data-testid="portal-dashboard"` (or `portal-home`) anchor on the landing page. Review asked for it; tests cannot reliably gate on dashboard render.

The 'VIEW PROJECTS FOR THIS MONTH' button (yellow CTA on /portal/events) has no data-testid. The downstream 'Open Project Folder' button + ProjectGuideModal could not be reached automatically — needs `data-testid="ptm-view-projects"` (or similar) for stable e2e gating.

Direct nav to `/portal/calendar` produces React-Router warning `No routes matched location "/portal/calendar"`. The Calendar sidebar link routes to `/portal/events`. Either add a `/portal/calendar` redirect or update any docs/emails referring to the legacy URL.

action_items: Add `data-testid="ptm-view-projects"` to the 'View Projects for this Month' button on PortalCalendarPage, and confirm `data-testid="project-folder-modal"|`project-folder-view-toggle`|`project-folder-zip-btn`|`project-folder-close`| are rendered (iter-26 redesign) — re-test once selector is added.
Unify `must_change_password` vs `force_password_change` on the admin users endpoint (or document the alias) — could surface as a banner on /admin/users for handover-pending users.
Either add `/portal/calendar` route or remove that legacy path from any handover comms.

Demo franchisee `sandra@creativemojo.co.uk` is currently NOT in `force_password_change=true` state (login lands directly on /portal) — for the real franchisee Foteini, ensure the HANDOVER ACCESS email flips the flag so the force-change flow actually fires. We did NOT mutate Sandra's account to preserve creds.
critical_code_review_comments: files_routes.py:~1636 `/files/folder-zip` streams source files in real time and silently skips files on `IncompleteRead`/connection drops (seen in backend.err.log while zipping a huge `shared/` prefix). Recommend: log to a job/audit row, and surface a partial-zip warning in the response headers so the UI can warn the user that some files were omitted.

Streaming the full `shared/` (6.4 GB / 1217 files) ZIP can saturate a single backend worker for minutes — multiple concurrent requests against /folder-zip with a large prefix caused upstream 30s read-timeouts on /api/auth/login. Consider a size cap, async job + signed URL, or moving ZIP generation to a worker queue.
force_password_change vs must_change_password naming drift across endpoints (login/me vs users-list). Pick one and alias the other in the Pydantic model.
Portal navigation: `/portal/calendar` is not registered but appears in legacy docs — either add a redirect route or remove references.

success_rate.frontend: 85% — login/nav/FileVault/Territory/HQ/Logout PASS; Project-Folder modal NOT EXERCISED (trigger lacks testid)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@creativemojo.co.uk / CreativeMojo2026! | Franchisee: sandra@creativemojo.co.uk / Test1234! (NOT mutated)
seed_data_creation: None — only filed a password-reset request for sandra@creativemojo.co.uk (status=pending). Did NOT fulfill it (would have rotated the live demo password). Main agent should reject/cleanup that pending row OR fulfill it if you want to exercise the force-change UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal login is a TWO-STEP form: enter email → click CONTINUE → password field appears → submit. The Calendar sidebar link routes to /portal/events (not /portal/calendar). The 'Open Project Folder' button is gated behind clicking the yellow 'VIEW PROJECTS FOR THIS MONTH' button which opens ProjectsThisMonthModal. Backend ZIP of large shared/ folders is very slow (>30s) — always pick a small sub-prefix (e.g. shared/_announcement_thumbs/). File listing endpoint is `/api/files/tree?prefix=...` (not `/api/files/list`). Admin users endpoint returns `must_change_password` + `handover_pending` (not `force_password_change`).
verified_flows: GET /api/auth/password-reset/requests?status=pending → 200, pending row visible to admin
Frontend: 2-step portal login → /portal lands NOT /admin, sidebar shows My Franchise/Territory/Calendar/File Vault/HQ Updates/Account
Frontend: /portal/events Calendar renders June 2026 with events, Month/Week/Day toggles, 'View Projects for this Month' CTA visible
Frontend: /portal/files (File Vault) shows shared folders 'All Projects & Templates' (1118 files, 5.81 GB) and 'Running Your Franchise Business' (99 files, 145.7 MB)
Frontend: /portal/territory renders Mapbox canvas + 118 homes / 62 sectors highlighted; only franchisee's assigned territory visible
Frontend: /portal/updates HQ Updates empty-state renders correctly
Frontend: Account dropdown → Logout clears cookies and redirects to /portal/login; /api/auth/me returns 401
not_verified: Force-password-change UX flow (demo account not in that state)
Admin fulfill-reset endpoint side-effects (skipped to preserve creds)
ProjectGuideModal (Open Project Folder) — trigger button has no testid; modal+List/Grid toggle+ZIP-all not exercised via UI
Admin HANDOVER ACCESS button on FranchiseeDetailPage (not reached in this run)
